name: demo
description: - `npm init`, `git init` - `npm install -D parcel` - `npm install react` - `npm install react-dom` - Update script property inside package.json file.     ```     "start": "parcel index.html"     "build": "parcel build index.html"     ``` - `npm start` command will run the code - `npm run build` command will build the production ready code.
author: Ansh
